def load_and_process(config_path):
    with open(config_path, "r") as f:
        lines = f.readlines()

    content = "".join(lines)
    version = lines[0].strip() if lines else ""
    line_count = len(lines)
    sections = [line for line in lines if line.startswith("[")]

    return {
        "version": version,
        "content": content,
        "line_count": line_count,
        "sections": sections,
    }
